task: RDT Part 1(c): k4 (alternative-adoption) + k1-China bounding inputs (SAFE anchor + COFER public world aggregate)

namespace_files.rdt_k4_rmb.csv: long format (country,item,period,value,tier,source); 142 data rows: PBoC swap lines, CIPS participation, LMW CNY/USD shares, SAFE disclosure, applicability flags
namespace_files.rdt_k4_cofer.csv: quarterly COFER world aggregate 2014-Q1..2026-Q1 (49 quarters): usd_share_pct_allocated, allocated_total_usd_bn
namespace_files.rdt_k4_provenance.md: SOURCE lines, quotes, verification notes, NOT-AVAILABLE / UNVERIFIED register

swap_lines.source: PBOC RMB Internationalization Report 2025 (EN PDF), pbc.gov.cn, fetched 2026-07-01

values.India: NO-SWAP-LINE (zero mentions; absent from all regional enumerations in the report)
values.Poland: NO-SWAP-LINE (Europe list = UK, Switzerland, Russia, Hungary, Turkiye, Iceland + ECB; Poland only via 2016 RMB bond approval)

cips.per_country_five_holders: NOT-AVAILABLE from cips.com.cn current site (announcements No.44/72/110/116/117 checked EN+CN; participant tables stripped, no attachments)

safe_anchor.edition: SAFE Annual Report 2018, Box 4, printed p.35 (PDF p.44)
safe_anchor.note: one-off disclosure; global comparator in same box: 1995 USD 59%, 2014 USD 65% (COFER basis)

cofer.methodology_break: since 2025Q3 release, unallocated eliminated with revisions back to 2000Q1; missing values imputed by IMF staff (TNM/2025/14); imputed share 2026-Q1 = 10.65% (TFXRA_IMP)

china_inclusion.grounded: China appears as a distinct entry on the IMF's published List of COFER Reporters (data.imf.org/en/Datasets/COFER/List-of-Reporters, fetched 2026-07-01); RMB separately identified in COFER from 2016Q4 survey (IMF PR 17/108; TNM/2025/14)
china_inclusion.unverified: the specific historical claim that China phased in COFER reporting partially starting 2015 was NOT found on any current IMF page fetched; recorded UNVERIFIED, not asserted

confidence.swap_lines: HIGH (publisher primary, exact chronology quotes with year headers verified)
confidence.lmw_shares: HIGH for what the panel discloses (read from committed file; panel itself is the RD0-vetted secondary-academic source)
confidence.safe_anchor: HIGH (publisher primary PDF, figures read from positioned text; pairing cross-checked against COFER-consistent global values in the same chart)
confidence.cofer: HIGH for the series; methodology break 2025Q3 flagged; China phase-in note UNVERIFIED

residual_route_caveat: Per RDT_prediction.md, COFER world aggregate enters ONLY as the bounding input for the k1-China INFERRED-BOUNDED cell. Post-2025Q3 COFER has NO unallocated portion: W_t is now a 100%-coverage imputed share, so the residual bound must carry the imputation caveat (imputed share ~10.65% of total in 2026-Q1), and China's inclusion in the reporter list is grounded but its historical phase-in timing is UNVERIFIED.
